svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="视觉验收pipeline" id="visPipeline2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-594" dy="-145" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1150" pageHeight="520" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="380 页 UI 视觉验收 pipeline（一个版本两边并行跑）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="580" x="280" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TRIG" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="版本封版 / PR 提交" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="220" x="460" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BR1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="新功能分支
(有原型锚点)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="60" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BR2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="老功能分支
(无原型)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="900" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="Playwright 双 context
原型 vs 实现 375×812 截图" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="40" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="pixelmatch 逐像素 diff
图片拦截 + 主题色 CSS 断言" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="40" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="四级容差 PASS_A/B/WARN_C/FAIL_D
内容演进页 → 人工/vision 介入" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="40" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="380 截图启发式筛
按文件大小异常挑代表页" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="880" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="5% 抽样(18 张) → vision 深审
出疑点(会幻觉)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="880" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="代码审计判真伪
design token + DOM computed-style
423/427 走 token / 4 文件硬编码(真问题)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="880" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MERGE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="结果汇总 → 验收报告
(功能完整性 + 样式正确性 + 兼容性 + 历史遗留)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="500" x="320" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_TB1" edge="1" parent="1" source="TRIG" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="BR1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_TB2" edge="1" parent="1" source="TRIG" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="BR2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_N12" edge="1" parent="1" source="N1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="N2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_N23" edge="1" parent="1" source="N2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="N3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_O12" edge="1" parent="1" source="O1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="O2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_O23" edge="1" parent="1" source="O2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="O3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_N3M" edge="1" parent="1" source="N3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="MERGE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_O3M" edge="1" parent="1" source="O3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="MERGE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
